name: Shrimp and Artichoke Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 4 1/2 tablespoons butter in a large skillet.
2. Stir in the remaining 4 1/2 tablespoons flour and add cream. Stir constantly until thickened.
3. Add salt and pepper to taste. Set aside.
4. Drain artichokes and cut into halves. Place at the bottom of a casserole dish.
5. Arrange shrimp over the artichoke halves.
6. Sauté mushrooms in the remaining butter until tender.
7. Sprinkle 1/4 teaspoon flour over the sautéed mushrooms and stir before scattering them over the shrimp.
8. Add sherry and Worcestershire sauce to the cream sauce.
9. Pour the cream sauce over the casserole.
10. Top with grated Parmesan cheese and paprika.
11. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
